response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates strong engineering discipline through TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practice, plus architectural breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically, but the foundational stack alignment and demonstrated learning agility make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB and AWS CDK delivery at Optilyz
Direct AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role matches a required skill
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop track record
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Heavy investment in DLang across multiple roles may indicate stack preferences that diverge from the primary TS/Nest.js focus
